creator: ru@ucb.crimea.ua
text:
Man says:
~~~~~~~~

SYNOPSIS
     mail [-iInv] [-s subject] [-c cc-addr] [-b bcc-addr] to-addr...
     mail [-iInNv] -f [name]
     mail [-iInNv] [-u user]

/usr/bin/mail says:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Usage: mail [-iInv] [-s subject] [-c cc-addr] [-b bcc-addr] to-addr ...
            [- sendmail-options ...]
       mail [-iInNv] -f [name]
       mail [-iInNv] [-u user]

Fix: cvs diff: Diffing src/usr.bin/mail
